Name: HERO_MENU_PARAM_ST
Description: Handles various visual information for Heros, such as appearances in menus and Visual Codex stats.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Character Select Pose
Fields.Description: The animation to use for this character when at Character Selection. (Unused)

Fields.Name: Character Select Camera ID
Fields.Description: The menu camera to use for this character when at Character Selection. (Unused)

Fields.Name: Change Garb Camera ID
Fields.Description: The menu camera to use for this character when at Change Garb.

Fields.Name: Change Garb Pose
Fields.Description: The animation to use for this character when at Change Garb.

Fields.Name: HP Grade
Fields.Description: HP letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: FP Grade
Fields.Description: FP letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Stamina Grade
Fields.Description: Stamina letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Strength Grade
Fields.Description: Strength letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Dexterity Grade
Fields.Description: Dexterity letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Intelligence Grade
Fields.Description: Intelligence letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Faith Grade
Fields.Description: Faith letter grade for Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Arcane Grade
Fields.Description: Arcane letter grade for Visual Codex
